prompt: Add a blank line at the end of skills/char-counter/SKILL.md

assertions.text: The response includes the 📄 emoji char count summary line
assertions.description: After any file edit, skill requires a one-line summary appended to the response

assertions.text: The summary line contains 'chars', 'non-whitespace', and 'lines' separated by |
assertions.description: Specific one-liner format: '📄 <filename>: X,XXX chars | X,XXX non-whitespace | XXX lines'

assertions.text: The summary line appears after the description of the edit, not before
assertions.description: Skill says to append the summary at the end of the response
